channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 34.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham vows to ‘change Labour’ in direct challenge to Keir Starmer
item.description: Andy Burnham vows to ‘change Labour’ in direct challenge to Keir Starmer

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Another subplot here is that under the terms of the Labour party rulebook, any candidate not called 'Keir Starmer' needs to get nominations from MPs, affiliates (including at least one trade union), and members.
Sim...
item.description:
Another subplot here is that under the terms of the Labour party rulebook, any candidate not called 'Keir Starmer' needs to get nominations from MPs, affiliates (including at least one trade union), and members.
Sim...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Downing Street accused of plot to derail Andy Burnham’s by-election hopes
item.description: Downing Street accused of plot to derail Andy Burnham’s by-election hopes

item.title: The Times: Andy Burnham would beat Keir Starmer in vote to lead Labour, poll finds - The Times
item.description: Andy Burnham would beat Keir Starmer in vote to lead Labour, poll finds - The Times

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: The Makerfield byelection is bigger than Andy Burnham. It is the essential proof of concept that Labour still has a chance of beating Reform.
My analysis on an electoral test like no other 👇
www.theguardian.com/pol...
item.description:
The Makerfield byelection is bigger than Andy Burnham. It is the essential proof of concept that Labour still has a chance of beating Reform.
My analysis on an electoral test like no other 👇
www.theguardian.com/pol...

item.title: i Politics: Streeting set to attack Reeves's record in major escalation of Labour infighting
item.description: Streeting set to attack Reeves's record in major escalation of Labour infighting

item.title: The Guardian: Makerfield byelection is about more than Andy Burnham - The Guardian
item.description: Makerfield byelection is about more than Andy Burnham - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Makerfield byelection is about more than Andy Burnham
item.description: Makerfield byelection is about more than Andy Burnham

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Greens split over how hard to challenge Burnham in Makerfield byelection
item.description: Greens split over how hard to challenge Burnham in Makerfield byelection

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Just as with winter fuel, and with two child, and with the welfare cuts, never bet against Keir Starmer doing the maximum damage to himself and to Labour in his inability to accept the inevitable:
item.description: Just as with winter fuel, and with two child, and with the welfare cuts, never bet against Keir Starmer doing the maximum damage to himself and to Labour in his inability to accept the inevitable:
